case_title: JASON WONG VS. BERGMANGAME INCORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERGMANGAME INCORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA MARIO RESTAURANT $20,556.90 PRINCIPAL, $92.95 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,949.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
